notes: SOD-123 1N4148W fallback is used because DO-35 conflicts with the compact hybrid switch footprint at 19.05 mm pitch.
Antenna keepout rule areas are generated directly in the board files.
Switch footprint values are sanitized as KEY_XX so Specctra DSN export does not expose legend characters such as backslash to Freerouting.
Right-half R_COL7 uses D21 and R_COL8 uses D20 to keep the longer outer column on the easier controller fanout pin.
Controller protrusion tabs are aligned toward the inner joining edge: left recessed 12 mm, right recessed 17 mm.
Controller protrusion tab width is 72 mm and grows away from the inner joining edge.
Programming tact switch uses the smaller DeviceMart 1322056 NW3-A06-B3 SMD footprint.
X1 copies the hot-swap switch layout and replaces the diode with a local hand-solder SOD-123 footprint for DeviceMart 14592018 1N4148W.
X1 right half adds 0.3 mm top outline relief to preserve board-edge clearance after autorouting with enlarged diode pads.
